title: senecio nanus
intro: Senecio nanus, also known as Dwarf Groundsel, is a small annual or biennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio nanus include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Senecio nanus is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a popular remedy in traditional folk medicine.
